hero.subtitle: Villiant Vault is an AI brain at the table — not a solver, but dynamic play styles, your game evolves every day.
hero.quote: "Capitalize on weaknesses + build knowledge and guard your bankroll from sharks"
hero.trust: No extreme focus needed · Improve rapidly

features.pain_overline: Pain Point — Straight truth, hurts a bit
features.pain_h2: You are gambling without an edge.
features.pain_sub: Donating daily, bleeding chips, and tilting. Stop feeding the fish and put your money in the vault.
features.ux_overline: UX — Play like a pro effortlessly
features.ux_h3:
You do 3 things.
The Vault does the rest.
features.f1_desc: Crop the table → paste → get Call/Fold + range + detailed plan instantly. No brain damage.
features.f2_desc: Dedicated panel: Whale, Reg, or yourself. Get specific exploit suggestions.
features.f3_desc: Fully customize your AI. Force it to answer conservatively (GTO) or aggressively (Max Exploit) using powerful overriding prompts.
features.f4_desc: Not just one boring AI. It's a team of pros with distinct personalities — no fatigue, no tilt.
features.f5_desc: The system fixes your play every day — never toxic but won't go easy on you.
features.f6_desc: GTO for the framework, exploit for the money, memory to protect the bankroll.

hud.h3:
Not on the table.
Separate panel, instant understanding.
hud.whales_tip: Bluff turn more • Thin value bet river
hud.you_tip: System fixes you daily — no mercy 😄

what_is.sub: Not a tool. Not a solver. Not a confusing VPIP/PFR HUD. It's 2026 — it's a vault + a brain + a tilt-free pro team.

pricing_section.h2: Cheaper than one bad river call.
pricing_section.sub: Invest in an AI that pays for itself in a single session.
pricing_section.a1: No — let Vault think, you just click.
pricing_section.a2: Vault doesn't know 'lost 3 hands in a row so I am mad'.
pricing_section.a3: Know the rules? That's enough. Vault pulls you up.

contact.h2: You are not a gambler — you are a BUSINESSMAN.
contact.sub: Stop bleeding edge. Manage your game like a portfolio.
contact.note: No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.
